result.stdout:
This tool helps skip deployment of a .dacpac to a SQL database if it has already been deployed.
https://github.com/ErikEJ/DacDeploySkip
Usage:
  dacdeployskip check "<dacpacPath>" "<connectionString>" [-namekey]
  dacdeployskip mark "<dacpacPath>" "<connectionString>" [-namekey]

commands.payload:
